note: RETROACTIVE record, NOT a forward plan. The feature is already implemented, tested (80/80 green under cargo nextest, ~84% line coverage) and merged across 6 commits on branch feature/change-generation (v4.0.2). This roadmap maps the ACTUAL work delivered back to DISTILL scenarios and the commit SHA that delivered each step. DES-EXEMPT: no DES execution-log, no DES markers, no TDD cycle was run for this backfill (the 11-phase TDD was N/A; implementation pre-existed and was GREEN). Each step's tdd field is 'retroactive-backfill'.

steps.name: diesel MultiConnection (backend-agnostic persistence)
acceptance_criteria: Persistence works against Postgres (prod) and SQLite (tests) through a single DbConnection enum.
CRUD functions take &mut DbConnection; default all-columns selection preserved.
Recorded applications can be saved and listed back.
steps.scenario_name: Application recorded when saving opted in (#17, persistence.feature)
steps.commit_message: refactor(db): backend-agnostic queries via diesel MultiConnection

steps.name: CommandRunner seam for testable subprocesses
acceptance_criteria: All subprocess effects flow through a CommandRunner port (status/output/spawn).
compile_cv / view_cv_file / is_tailscale_connected accept an injected &dyn CommandRunner.
steps.scenario_name: Connectivity confirmed when secure network up (#22, persistence.feature)
steps.commit_message: feat(command-runner): add CommandRunner seam for testable subprocesses

steps.name: Variant build via Justfile + configurable output + tool checks
acceptance_criteria: Variant resolution precedence: valid --variant flag wins, else inference from job title, else configured default.
Build runs `<builder> <recipe> <variant>` (just/tectonic) in a dated working copy via the injected runner.
Output PDF filed under per-year output dir with deterministic <date>-<job>-<company>.pdf name; working dir cleaned up.
Pre-usage PATH tool checks fail fast with a devenv hint.
steps.scenario_name: Francesco generates a tailored CV end to end (#8, cv-build.feature, @walking_skeleton @driving_port)
steps.commit_message: feat(cv): build variant via Justfile, configurable output, tool checks

steps.name: Coverage discipline / exclusions
acceptance_criteria: llvm-cov coverage(off) exclusions applied; generated schema.rs ignored.
Coverage measurement is deterministic and reflects testable surface (54% -> 84%).
cargo nextest used for process-per-test determinism (GLOBAL_VAR OnceCell).
steps.scenario_name: Tool present on path reported available (#32, preview.feature)
steps.commit_message: chore(coverage): use llvm-cov coverage(off) exclusions, ignore schema.rs

supporting_commits.role: environment scaffolding (toolchain: just, tectonic, zathura, tailscale); not a feature step

supporting_commits.message: docs(nwave): backfill DESIGN wave for cv-variant-build
supporting_commits.role: documentation commit (DESIGN/brief/ADRs); not part of feature delivery

supporting_commits.message: chore(tooling): claude session logs and nix-store config symlinks
